evals.name: identify-by-name
evals.expected_output: Routes to Identify mode; opens references/identify.md and looks up Ratatouille in references/recipes.json. Returns the ingredient list, marking the spice slot as a category slot.

evals.name: identify-fuzzy
evals.prompt: what are the ingredients for Sauteed Mushroom (might be spelled different)
evals.expected_output: Identify mode with fuzzy matching. Normalizes 'Sauteed Mushroom' to 'Sautéed Mushrooms' and returns ingredients.

evals.name: identify-not-in-dataset
evals.prompt: what's in the brand new Wonderland-themed Tea Cake recipe?
evals.expected_output: Identify mode triggers. Searches references/recipes.json, finds no match, says so plainly and offers to look up on the wiki. Does NOT invent ingredients.

evals.name: identify-slash
evals.expected_output: Slash command directly routes to Identify mode for Bell Pepper Puffs.

evals.name: recommend-natural
evals.prompt: what should I cook? I've got a ton of tomatoes, onions, eggplant, zucchini, and some spice
evals.expected_output: Recommend mode triggers. With those ingredients, Ratatouille is satisfiable; rank by efficiency.

evals.name: recommend-profit
evals.prompt: what's the most profitable thing I can cook right now?
evals.expected_output: Recommend mode with objective=profit. Asks for ingredients on hand if not provided.

evals.name: recommend-flags
evals.expected_output: Recommend mode, profit objective, floor 99. With these ingredients Arendellian Pickled Herring is cookable (4 fixed slots satisfied; spice is a category slot).

evals.name: recommend-course-filter
evals.prompt: I want a dessert recipe to cook, what's most profitable? I have plenty of every ingredient.
evals.expected_output: Recommend mode, filters by course=dessert before ranking on profit.

evals.name: restock-natural
evals.prompt: here's a screenshot of my storage, what do I need to gather to top up?
evals.expected_output: Stock-check mode. Reads storage screenshot per icon-cues.md, compares to gatherables.json, produces a categorized gather checklist.

evals.name: restock-slash-floor
evals.expected_output: Stock-check mode with floor override of 99. Asks for storage screenshot if absent.

evals.name: restock-category
evals.prompt: /restock --category gems just tell me which gems i'm low on
evals.expected_output: Stock-check mode restricted to gems category.

evals.name: screenshot-cookbook
evals.prompt: I uploaded a screenshot of my open cookbook with several recipe names visible — can you tell me what's in each?
evals.expected_output: Identify mode handles multi-dish screenshot. Returns one ingredient block per dish in the order they appear.

evals.name: negative-unrelated-game
evals.prompt: what's the best build for crossbow in Elden Ring?
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT activate. Unrelated game.

evals.name: negative-ddv-non-cooking
evals.prompt: how do I unlock Wishblossom Mountains in Dreamlight Valley?
evals.expected_output: DDV-related but not about cooking, gathering, or inventory. Skill should not activate; the prompt is about story/progression.

evals.name: negative-recipe-creation
evals.prompt: can you invent a new Dreamlight Valley recipe that uses cherries and cocoa beans?
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT activate for inventing recipes. Bundled data is authoritative and we don't fabricate.

evals.name: negative-real-cooking
evals.prompt: what can I make for dinner tonight with onion, cheese, and eggplant?
evals.expected_output: Real-world cooking question, no DDV context. Skill should not activate.
